generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we had strong alliances? Our nation's security depends on reliable partners. Recent reports show that some allies aren't pulling their weight, leaving us vulnerable. We can't afford to be taken advantage of. It's time to demand fair burden-sharing or reconsider commitments that don't protect us equally. #NationalSecurityFirst #AllianceAccountability
